stories.story: As a patient, I want to register an account and log in so that I can book appointments.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Registration with unique username, email, password; login and session management.

stories.story: As a patient, I want to select a date, doctor, and available slot so that I can request an appointment.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Date picker, doctor roster with profiles, slot display based on shifts and capacity, appointment type selection.

stories.story: As a patient, I want to cancel my own appointment requests so that I can manage my bookings.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Cancel only own requests, status updated to Cancelled.

stories.story: As a patient, I want to reschedule a pending appointment request so that I can change the date/time.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Reschedule only Pending Review requests, choose new slot, same doctor.

stories.story: As a doctor, I want to view my appointment queue and review requests so that I can confirm or cancel them.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Only own appointments, review modal with notes, status change.

stories.story: As a doctor, I want to manage my profile and view day-board so that I can keep information up to date.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Edit own profile, see schedule for selected date.

stories.story: As an admin, I want to manage all appointment queues and doctor accounts so that I can oversee the system.
stories.acceptance_criteria: View all appointments, create/edit doctors, review any appointment.

stories.story: As the system, I want to enforce scheduling rules and audit changes so that the process is reliable.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Future weekdays, 30-min slots, capacity, conflict detection, audit log.

stories.story: As the Clinic System, I want to provide a non-diagnostic administrative summary for an appointment so that staff can review scheduling context without medical advice.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Given an existing appointment, when GET /api/appointments/<id>/summary is called, then the response contains only administrative appointment details and status, with no diagnosis or treatment advice.
